title: Diffusion Models Path
description: Build fluency in Diffusion Models inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Stable Diffusion
steps.summary: Stable Diffusion belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Diffusion Models. It sits inside Generative Models / Diffusion Models. Start after Diffusion and Diffusion Model. It opens into Stable Diffusion XL and Stable Diffusion-v1-4.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Latent Diffusion Model
steps.summary: Latent Diffusion Model belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Diffusion Models. It sits inside Generative Models / Diffusion Models. Start after Diffusion and Diffusion Model. It opens into Latent Action Diffusion and Latent Consistency Diffusion.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Diffusion Energy Model
steps.summary: Diffusion Energy Model belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Diffusion Models. It sits inside Generative Models / Diffusion Models. Start after Diffusion and Diffusion Model. It opens into Energy-Guided Diffusion and Energy-Based Diffusion Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Denoising Diffusion Models

Start after Diffusion and Diffusion Model. It opens into Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model and Denoising diffusion probabilistic models.

steps.title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model

Start after Denoising Diffusion Models and Diffusion. It opens into Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM).
